## Plugin and host

- **Plugin:** (e.g. DuskAmp 0.1.0)
- **Format:** (VST3 / AU / LV2)
- **Host DAW + version:** (e.g. Logic Pro 11.0.1)
- **OS + version:** (e.g. macOS 14.4 / Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04)

## What happened

(Describe the bug. Include audio symptoms — clicks, dropouts, silence, distortion — if any.)

## What you expected

## How to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Crash log (if the plugin crashed)

If the plugin crashed, attach the crash log:

1. Open the plugin's About panel (click the title bar).
2. Click **Open crash log folder**.
3. Attach `crash.log` to this issue.

The log is local-only — no telemetry is sent automatically. Review it before attaching if you want to scrub identifying info.
